inputs.label: Purchase Price
inputs.businessContext: Initial purchase price of the car

inputs.label: Residual Value (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected residual value as percentage of purchase price at end of life

inputs.label: Current Age
inputs.businessContext: Current age of the car in years

inputs.label: Expected Lifespan
inputs.businessContext: Expected total useful lifespan of the car in years

inputs.label: Expected Mileage Life
inputs.businessContext: Expected total mileage life of the car

formulas.currentValue: purchasePrice - (( (currentAge/expectedLifespan + mileage/expectedMileage + Math.sqrt((currentAge/expectedLifespan - mileage/expectedMileage) ** 2)) / 2 ) * (purchasePrice - purchasePrice * residualValuePercentage/100))
formulas.depreciationPercentage: ((( (currentAge/expectedLifespan + mileage/expectedMileage + Math.sqrt((currentAge/expectedLifespan - mileage/expectedMileage) ** 2)) / 2 ) * (purchasePrice - purchasePrice * residualValuePercentage/100)) / purchasePrice) * 100
